Name: FOrbitOptions
Description: Container struct for holding options on the data updating for the module.

Variables.Name: bProcessDuringSpawn
Variables.Description: Whether to process the data during spawning.

Variables.Name: bProcessDuringUpdate
Variables.Description: Whether to process the data during updating.

Variables.Name: bUseEmitterTime
Variables.Description: Whether to use emitter time during data retrieval.

Variables.Name: bUseParticleIDInsteadOfTime
Variables.Description: Whether to use particle ID instead of time (emitter time or particle time).

Variables.Name: ParticleIDLoop
Variables.Description: If >0, the distribution input will be ParticleID % ParticleIDLoop
